heading: Immunity proceedings
label: 288f Immunity proceedings
text: When directed to do so pursuant to , the Counsel shall serve as the duly authorized representative of the Senate or a committee or subcommittee of the Senate in requesting a United States district court to issue an order granting immunity pursuant to .section 288b(d) of this titlesection 6005 of title 18
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 3, 1979section 717 of Pub. L. 95–521section 288 of this title
